claim_bullets.bullet_text: The section defines linked-list helpers including copy, first, rest, reverse, mapWith, at, and set (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.159-161).
The set function modifies an element at a specific index in a linked list (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.159-161).
The at function accesses an element at a specific index in a linked list (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.159-161).

source_record_text: Chapter on a few utilities in JavaScriptAllonge, covering list manipulation functions.
